cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this question. The text is about Zhao Wenxuan, a Taiwanese film star. The question asks which of the four options is suggested by the text. First, let me read through the options again: A) "Wedding Feast" is just an ordinary film B) the film "Wedding Feast" disappointed people greatly C) Zhao Wenxuan became a famous movie star because of the film "Wedding Feast" D) A lot of the Taiwan films are shown in the U. S. every year Now, I need to check the text for information that supports one of these options. Looking at the text, the part about "Wedding Feast" says: "The film 'Wedding Feast' proved to be a hit. It won the German Golden Bear Award and entered the competition for one of the Oscar Academy Awards. Also, it was the first Taiwan film that was permitted to be shown in the U. S. Thanks to the film, Zhao Wenxuan became popular in Taiwan, Hong Kong and southeast Asia." So, from this, "Wedding Feast" was a successful film. That means option A says it's ordinary, but the text says it's a hit and won awards, so A is incorrect. Option B says it disappointed people, but the text says the opposite, so B is wrong. Option C says Zhao became famous because of this film. The text says "Thanks to the film, Zhao... became popular..." So that supports option C. Option D says a lot
